name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax Title Loans is located at 1117 Murfreesboro Rd, Franklin, TN 37064. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 376 reviews. Call +1 615-538-6014.
description_long:
TitleMax is a title lending company with physical locations across multiple states, including a Memphis, TN store on Summer Avenue that has operated since February 2007. The company specializes in providing fast cash loans using vehicle titles as collateral, targeting consumers who need emergency funds but may have poor or limited credit histories.

The Memphis location offers two primary products: (1) Title Pledges & Flex Lines of Credit—secured loans where borrowers pledge their vehicle title to access cash while retaining driving privileges—and (2) Unsecured Flexible Lines of Credit—personal loans available online and in-store that don't require collateral. Both products emphasize quick approval and same-day funding. The company performs credit checks but explicitly states that most credit types are accepted, positioning itself as an accessible option for borrowers with damaged credit.

TitleMax differentiates itself through its multi-product approach (secured and unsecured), bilingual service at the Memphis location, flexible line-of-credit structures that allow incremental withdrawals, and stated competitive rates. The store maintains strong customer satisfaction metrics, with a 5.0/5 average rating across 481+ Google reviews. Staff are highlighted for professionalism and knowledgeability. The company also operates multiple nearby locations in Memphis, providing geographic convenience.

However, as a title lending company, TitleMax operates in a high-risk lending category. While the website emphasizes manageable payments and competitive rates, title loans inherently carry risks including potential vehicle repossession if payments are missed, high effective APRs typical of the title loan industry, and the reality that customers requiring such products are often in financial distress. The company's focus on vehicle value as the primary loan criterion rather than income stability reflects the predatory characteristics common to this lending category, despite professional service quality.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified borrowers
Customers retain full driving privileges while repaying title loans
Accepts most credit types, including poor or no credit history
Flexible line-of-credit option allowing incremental withdrawals up to credit limit
Bilingual service available at Memphis location
5.0/5 star average rating across 481+ verified Google reviews
Offers both secured (title) and unsecured personal loan products
Multiple convenient locations across Memphis area
cons: Title loans carry risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed
Typical title loan APRs are significantly higher than traditional lending, though specific rates not disclosed on website
Targets financially vulnerable consumers, raising ethical concerns despite professional service delivery
Unsecured line of credit availability limited to 10 specific states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Loan approval based primarily on vehicle value rather than income stability or ability to repay
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency cash ($500-$3,000 range typical for title loans)
Vehicle owners facing unexpected expenses who want to avoid traditional bank loans
Borrowers in Memphis area who prefer in-person service and bilingual support
Individuals needing flexible access to credit over time rather than a lump sum
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners in financial emergencies with poor credit histories who need same-day cash and can afford higher interest rates typical of title lending. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-risk products with vehicle repossession consequences and substantially higher costs than traditional loans—borrowers should exhaust other options first and only use this service when truly urgent and confident in repayment ability.
services: Vehicle title pledge loans with same-day funding
Flex lines of credit secured by vehicle title
Line of credit with flexible withdrawal options
Credit checks and approval for most credit types
In-store loan management and customer service
Online loan portal access and management
Bilingual customer service (at Memphis TN 9 location)
